title: Weekly Market Report | May 25–29, 2026
report:
## Japan Equity Markets — Weekly Overview

The Nikkei 225 moved **+22,715 pts (+56.5%)** this week (40,132 → 62,847).

The average return across all 67 themes was **+8.4%**.

---

## 📅 Key Events & News This Week

- NVIDIA Q1 FY2027 earnings: Revenue $46B (+122%), Guide $56B (+170%) — historic blowout
- Entire NVIDIA supply chain surged in cascade
- Nikkei 225 crosses 60,000 for the first time ever on May 29 (62,847, +3,211pts)
- Advantest, Tokyo Electron, Murata hit daily limit-up levels repeatedly
- Month-end rebalancing: institutional equity buying accelerated the rally

---
